hero.title: Minute of Silence
hero.subtitle: Automatically conducts a minute of silence daily at 9:00 AM. 10 audio presets to choose from.

about.title: What is it?
about.description: Desktop app for Windows and Linux that automatically conducts a minute of silence at 9:00 AM daily.
about.shortlyContent: Runs in background with minimal resource usage. Starts automatically with the system. Supports NTP time synchronization.

features.title: Features
features.description: Everything needed to conduct the ceremony.

auto.name: ⏰ Automatic
auto.meta: Starts with Windows/Linux and conducts the ceremony daily at 9:00 AM

media.name: 🔇 Stops Media
media.meta: Automatically pauses music and video in all apps

signal.name: 🔔 Signal
signal.meta: Plays audio signal at the beginning and end of the ceremony

ntp.name: 💾 NTP Sync
ntp.meta: Precise time via NTP server, even if system time is off

skip.name: 📅 Skip Day
skip.meta: Option to skip the ceremony for a specific day

volume.name: 🔊 Volume Control
volume.meta: Automatic volume control during the ceremony

presets.title: 10 Presets
presets.description: Choose from 10 variants of conducting the ceremony.

list.title: Voice + Metronome
list.subtitle: Announcement with metronome
list.content: Classic variant with voice announcement and metronome

list.title: Voice + Silence + Bell
list.subtitle: Announcement, 60s silence, bell
list.content: Traditional variant with bell sound at the end

list.title: Bell + Metronome + Bell
list.subtitle: Bell, metronome, bell
list.content: Bell at the beginning and end

origin.title: Original Idea
origin.description: The desktop app is a development of Bohdan Hdal's idea — the author of the "Minute of Silence" mobile app.
origin.authorContent: First implemented the idea of automatic minute of silence in a mobile app for iOS and Android. His interview on "Radio Culture" became the impetus for creating this desktop version.
origin.quote: "Since this is a thing for the common good, I only welcome any development of the idea"

download.title: Download
download.description: Free download for Windows and Linux.

list.q: Do I need to install it?
list.a: Yes, it's a desktop app for Windows/Linux. Installs once and automatically starts with the system.
No, runs in background. Activates only for a short time at 9:00 AM.

list.q: Do notifications come before the ceremony?
list.a: Yes, a system notification with a reminder comes 5 minutes before the ceremony.
Currently the time is fixed at 9:00 AM. This matches the traditional time for conducting a minute of silence in Ukraine.
Yes, through the app interface or system tray.

footer.style: Minimal brutalism · Black / White · No extra effects
